arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta set to add surprising name to Arsenal coaching staff
arts.sum: There’s little doubt that Mikel Arteta has made great strides as Arsenal first-team coach, with only silverware needed to cement his legacy at the club. The team he has put together bears little resemblance to the one he inherited, and they’re playing a brand of winning football that’s also easy on the eye. It’s a […] The post Mikel Arteta set to add surprising name to Arsenal coaching staff appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Three changes Cooper must make to earn Leicester City their first win
arts.sum: It’s the final game of September and Leicester City are still without a victory in the Premier League. City have come through five games so far without snatching three points, so what needs to happen to finally get that first win?

arts.ttl: 'I was offered big money to join Arsenal after transfer talks - here's why I snubbed them'
arts.sum: Jamie Vardy has explained that the Gunners came knocking for his signature after the star striker won the Premier League with Leicester City - but he wasn't keen on a move to north London

arts.ttl: 'The perfect captain': Kai Havertz shares what Martin Odegaard has been doing behind the scenes at Arsenal despite injury
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to build on the solid foundations they’ve laid this season when they host Leicester City in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon....

arts.ttl: Junior Hoilett on the sobering Arsenal experience that has him ready to take on Rangers with new Hibs forward line
arts.sum: Dwight Gayle has joined Hoilett at Easter Road and the experienced duo could be unleashed at Ibrox tomorrow.

arts.ttl: 'My transfer to Arsenal was nearly done but the deal was blocked - I lost two years'
arts.sum: Riyad Mahrez was inches away from a mammoth move to Arsenal a year after his Leicester City heroics but was allegedly blocked by the club, leaving the Premier League champion "frustrated"

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news before Leicester clash amid Raya and White return hope
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be hoping David Raya and Ben White are available for selection to face Leicester City this afternoon. With that said, football.london has taken a look at all of the Arsenal players that could miss out and thus their potential return dates.

arts.ttl: Riccardo Calafiori Compares Serie A & Premier League
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori left Serie A in the summer to link up with Arsenal despite Thiago Motta's desperate attempt to lure him to Juventus. The Gunners paid Bologna £42 million to sign the versatile defender, who enjoyed a standout 2023/24 season at Renato Dall'Ara. The post Riccardo Calafiori Compares Serie A & Premier League appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted XI vs Leicester as Mikel Arteta weighs up key David Raya decision
arts.sum: Arsenal return to Premier League action on Saturday afternoon when Leicester visit the Emirates but the consequences from last weekend's draw at Manchester City continue to be felt

arts.ttl: Arteta ban warning, Guardiola scared as Arsenal vs Man City war of words erupts
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta rolled his eyes when there were more questions about his tactics and the use of so-called 'dark arts' during his press conference ahead of the game with Leicester City this weekend. Though Manchester City and Arsenal have been the best two teams in the Premier League for the last three years, it hasn't felt like a proper rivalry for two reasons.
